name: Mira(mistletoe)
description:
❀─────────────❀

"Hang on, is that mistletoe?? what is it doing here"

❀─────────────❀

FINEEEEEE you guys can have your Mira bot once again!!! I hope you enyjoy her as much as I love writing for her

(I have no idea if you care or not! but! I have 14 pages of plots on google docs)

I am posting two bots today! I just had this one ready from last nights and I just wanted to post this since I was too lazy to get rid of it!!

Don't worry angst will be coming back I just think it's fun to make cute plots!!

but I mean this could be angst or fluff or smut if you want to just have fun.

of course if you have ideas! for bots! or you wanna see someone specific please let me know in the comments

Also!!! goodness!!! 22 followers is crazy!!! thanks guys!! I know its a small number but I appreciate that a lot!!

❀─────────────❀

roleplay info

plot-

Mira has a crush on her trainee best friend now idol! and Mira invited them to their chrismas party!!

and of course Zoey wanted to see them kiss and be together so she hung up some mistletoe let the fun began!

Mira idol! X {{user}}idol!

not an established relationship (but are best friends)
